title: Equal-domain universality remains gated
code_or_evidence_gap: Navigation still lacks a defended real-data row and aerospace still lacks a non-placeholder flight surface.
required_action: Keep the parity matrix in the main synthesis chapter and state the open gates explicitly.

title: Legacy thesis scaffolding weakens the universal-first story
code_or_evidence_gap: Reader-facing legacy roadmap language and battery-origin framing still survive in non-canonical thesis chapters.
required_action: Rewrite or retire the legacy roadmap chapters so the repo stops contradicting the book build.

title: Review package is misaligned with the new program
code_or_evidence_gap: The existing red-team package is a 20-reviewer cautionary audit instead of the requested 5-reviewer R1 program.
required_action: Replace the dossier with a five-reviewer, three-wave review program tied to the parity gate.

title: Parity gate is not yet equal across all six domains
code_or_evidence_gap: Battery, industrial, healthcare, and bounded AV rows are defended; navigation and aerospace remain open.
required_action: Keep equal-domain language conditional on the parity artifact rather than prose aspiration.

title: Domain chapters need explicit fallback and non-claim sections
code_or_evidence_gap: Earlier bridge chapters describe domain context well but do not always state fallback/runtime behavior and exact non-claims uniformly.
required_action: Standardize all six domain chapters on one template and keep the same headings in every row.

title: Bibliography is book-scale but still below target depth
code_or_evidence_gap: The monograph bibliography is close to the target and should clear 180 entries for the universal-first book plan.
required_action: Add a small set of foundational safety and validation references so the bibliography crosses the stated floor.

title: Navigation real-data closure is still missing
code_or_evidence_gap: The navigation row still depends on bounded synthetic traces rather than a defended real-data train/validate/replay chain.
required_action: Finish the real-data navigation row before any equal-peer universality claim is promoted.

title: Aerospace remains an experimental outer-boundary row
code_or_evidence_gap: The aerospace row still lacks a real multi-flight benchmark and non-placeholder safety object.
required_action: Replace the placeholder surface before treating aerospace as a defended peer.

title: Cross-domain composition and governance coverage is still selective
code_or_evidence_gap: Composition and runtime-governance evaluation now extend beyond battery, but not across every domain.
required_action: Keep composition and governance as bounded universal layers and expand them only where the adapter contract and evidence support it.
